text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 183 

PROD_RPLCMT_RCLL_SW 

LABEL: Product Replacement for Recall of Product 

DESCRIPTION: The switch used to identify whether a claim involves the replacement of a product because of the 
Manufacturer or FDA having identified the product for recall and therefore a replacement. 

SHORT NAME: PROD_RPLCMT_RCLL_SW 

LONG NAME: PROD_RPLCMT_RCLL_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Y =
